The movie "Spirited Away" is a Ghibli film directed by Hayao Miyazaki.

If you enjoyed this film, you might also like "My Neighbor Totoro" or "Kiki's Delivery Service." These films offer similar themes of adventure and self-discovery in imaginative worlds.
